privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic beekeeping data analysis task with 5 hives tracked over 4 weeks. The task requires calculating health scores for Week 4 hives (rows 17-21) using a weighted scoring system totaling 0-23 points with specific thresholds. Key verified facts: 300-second timeout, 50 max steps, medium difficulty, 5 hives (Hive-A through Hive-E), 4 weeks of data, mixed text/numeric format (e.g., 'Strong' vs 40000 for population). Health scoring: Population (5/3/1), Brood frames (5/3/1), Honey stores (5/3/1), Disease status (5/2/0 for None/Possible/Confirmed), Queen bonus (3/0 for Yes/No). Three risk categories: at-risk <12 (Hive-C=3), monitor 12-17 (Hive-E=14), healthy 18+ (Hives A/B/D=23/19/23). CSV columns: Week, Hive ID, Inspection Date, Population, Brood, Honey, Disease, Queen. Requires formulas (not hardcoded), conditional formatting on I17:I21, save as ODS. All data synthetic, created inline in setup script.
